import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from asteroid.models import ConvTasNet

class SpeechEnhancementModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, sample_rate=16000, n_repeats=3, n_blocks=8, bn_chan=128, hid_chan=256, skip_chan=128, n_filters=512, kernel_size=16):
        super().__init__()
        self.model = ConvTasNet(
            n_src=1,
            n_repeats=n_repeats,
            n_blocks=n_blocks,
            bn_chan=bn_chan,
            hid_chan=hid_chan,
            skip_chan=skip_chan,
            n_filters=n_filters,
            kernel_size=kernel_size,
            sample_rate=sample_rate
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        if x.dim() == 2:
            x = x.unsqueeze(1)
        return self.model(x).squeeze(1)
